Adhi Yoga is one of the best Yogas for affluence and power. A vety
good attempt has also been made by them to explain the rationale
behind the good effects of this most important yoga. It. however,
appears that something more can be said on the subject particutarly on
the rationale and hence the following lines.
Before we 90 into the rationale of this most important and useful
yoga. we should better reproduce the Sloka from Maharishi Parasara
himself, the Sloka that forms the basis of our present discussion. Dealing
with Ch<mdradhi Yoga he avers:
Chandradrandrari kamasthathi somyaiS -
Yad6dhiyogakaha
Tatra raja ella mantra cha senani cha
Balakramat.
That is. from the position of the Moon. if there are in the 81 the

6~" or in ttle house. natural benefic planets. then Chandradhi Yoga is
constituted. When the yoga is formed, you have a king or a minister or
a general, respectively. in the descending order of the strength of
benefic ptanets involved.
